touches.ai_summary: Inbound request from Evelyn Rao expressing interest in call recording and coaching capabilities. Brief initial contact to set expectations for follow-up.

questions_asked.question: Do you offer AI-powered call coaching for sales teams?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we provide automated call analysis, coaching insights, and unlimited automation capabilities.

next_steps: Send overview materials and calendar link for discovery call

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email confirming receipt of request and sharing initial product overview. Evelyn responded positively and indicated readiness to schedule discovery call.

questions_asked.question: How does your platform differ from Fathom?
questions_asked.answer: Our unlimited automation tier includes advanced coaching workflows and RevOps integrations that go beyond basic recording.

next_steps: Schedule discovery call for next week

touches.ai_summary: 34-minute discovery call with Evelyn covering current RevOps pain points and coaching needs. PhotonCollective is a 47-person team looking to improve sales coaching consistency. Currently evaluating Fathom as alternative. Evelyn is the champion but mentioned needing to loop in Ravi Morgan for procurement review. No executive sponsor identified yet.

questions_asked.question: What's driving the need for call coaching now?
questions_asked.answer: We've doubled the sales team in 6 months and coaching quality is inconsistent. Need scalable solution.

questions_asked.question: Who else is involved in this decision?
questions_asked.answer: I'm driving this from RevOps side. Ravi Morgan will handle procurement and contracting. Our VP Sales is aware but delegated to me.

questions_asked.question: Can your platform integrate with our existing CRM and handle 7 users initially?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, full CRM integration available and 7 seats works well for your use case.

questions_asked.question: What's the typical implementation timeline?
questions_asked.answer: Standard implementation is 2-3 weeks including training and integration setup.

objections: We're also looking at Fathom which has a simpler pricing model
next_steps: Send demo video and pricing proposal for 7 seats
Schedule follow-up to review proposal next week

touches.ai_summary: Sent demo video and initial pricing proposal. Evelyn acknowledged receipt and indicated she's reviewing with Ravi. Mentioned they're still in active discussions with Fathom.

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility on the unlimited automation tier pricing for a smaller team?
questions_asked.answer: Let me discuss with leadership on potential adjustments for your team size and use case.

next_steps: Evelyn to review internally with Ravi
Follow up mid-week on pricing discussion

touches.ai_summary: Shared revised proposal with adjusted pricing for PhotonCollective's team size. Evelyn responded that the pricing is more competitive now and they're moving forward with internal review. Still comparing against Fathom's offer.
next_steps: Evelyn to present to Ravi and get procurement feedback
Aim for decision by end of week

touches.ai_summary: Check-in on procurement review status. Evelyn indicated Ravi has concerns about total cost versus Fathom's pricing. Requested additional discount to make business case stronger internally. No mention of executive review or approval.

questions_asked.question: Can you match Fathom's pricing or get closer to their tier?
questions_asked.answer: I've applied significant discount already (31.2% off list) bringing ACV to $5,200. This is at the edge of what I can approve without additional justification.

next_steps: Evelyn to confirm if current pricing works for internal budget
Rep to hold at current discount pending executive sponsor engagement

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up on pricing discussion and decision timeline. Evelyn confirmed the discount brings them within budget and they're ready to move forward pending final contract review with Ravi. Timeline pushed slightly but commitment to close this month remains.
next_steps: Send contract to Ravi for legal/procurement review
Target signature by end of month
